entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: Country where 69% of arable land is rainfed and drought is a constant threat

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: A recurring phenomenon and constant threat to agriculture in India

entities.name: HISTORICAL WEATHER DATA
entities.description: Data used to understand drought patterns and establish growing season length

entities.name: CROPPING SYSTEMS
entities.description: Agricultural systems fitted based on growing season length and drought patterns

entities.name: LAND DEGRADATION
entities.description: Environmental decline forming a nexus with drought and poverty

entities.name: POVERTY
entities.description: Socio-economic state forming a nexus with drought and land degradation

entities.name: INTEGRATED WATERSHED DEVELOPMENT APPROACH
entities.description: Approach used to break the nexus between drought, land degradation, and poverty

entities.name: FARMER PARTICIPATORY CONSORTIUM MODEL
entities.description: Innovative model for efficient and sustainable management of natural resources in watersheds

entities.name: NATURAL RESOURCES
entities.description: Resources managed within watersheds for sustainability

entities.name: INTEGRATED GENETIC AND NATURAL RESOURCE MANAGEMENT
entities.description: Approach (IGNRM) used for improving livelihoods through watershed entry points

entities.name: LIVELIHOODS
entities.description: The means of securing the necessities of life, improved through IGNRM

entities.name: ANDHRA PRADESH
entities.description: Indian state where the Rural Livelihoods Program was implemented

entities.name: ANDHRA PRADESH RURAL LIVELIHOODS PROGRAM
entities.description: Program involving case studies and scaling-up activities for rural livelihoods

relationships.description: Drought is a constant threat in India
Used to understand patterns of drought occurrence
Used to fit suitable cropping systems
Used to break the nexus involving drought
Used to break the nexus involving land degradation
Used to break the nexus involving poverty
Used for efficient and sustainable management of natural resources
